title: Surgeon Vacancy at Shroff Eye Centre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Shroff Eye Centre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!
